TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Qatu ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 306 buwan, 1,166 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 1,075 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 91 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 89%, Amis 1%, Tayan 1%, Setik 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qatu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qatu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Qatu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Qatu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'llaw na Qatu hya' ga Bukai. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qatu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, s~ɕetik *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qatu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na qatu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qatu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na qatu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔllaw na qatu ħjaʔ ɣa βukai. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Qatu ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 306 buwan, 1,166 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 1,075 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 91 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 89%, Amis 1%, Tayan 1%, Setik 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qatu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qatu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Qatu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Qatu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'llaw na Qatu hya' ga Bukai. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qatu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, s~ɕetik *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qatu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na qatu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qatu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na qatu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔllaw na qatu ħjaʔ ɣa βukai. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
